author: Nabi Bakhsh, M.
title: Jantri, San 1910
notes: An almanac/calendar (jantri) for 1910, 2000 copies free — the calendrical/almanac genre; note it registers in the very quarter it opens (March 1910).

title: Nairang-i-Fasahat
gloss: A collection of the discourses, sermons and speeches delivered by Ali, the fourth Caliph of the prophet Muhammad, and the letters written by him, translated into Urdu by Zakir Hussain from the original Arabic Nahjul Balaghat.
notes: The Nahj al-Balagha (sermons/letters of Ali) translated into Urdu, 560 pp. — the foundational Shia text of Ali's eloquence; a major Shia devotional-literary undertaking (cf. the two lives of Ali at p24). The Ali-centred print of this quarter is substantial.

author: Nand Lal
title: Gae
gloss: The picture of the cow, with a short account of its form, habits etc.
publisher: Nand Lal, B.A., and Co., Co-operative Works
notes: Single-sheet wall-chart 'The Cow' — the Nand Lal & Co. educational picture-sheet series (s29-34), animal/plant nature-study charts for schools; '(Designed for educational purposes.)'. The cow chart is notable given cow-protection politics, but here framed as neutral nature study.

author: Nand Lal
title: Janwaron ka Naqsha
gloss: Pictures of animals for the use of Primary Schools.
publisher: Nand Lal and Co., Co-operative Works
notes: Large (44x36") composite animal wall-chart for primary schools. '(Designed for educational purposes.)'.

author: Nand Lal
title: Kapas
gloss: The picture of the cotton plant with a short description of its form, uses, etc.
publisher: Nand Lal and Co., Co-operative Works
notes: Cotton-plant nature-study chart. '(Designed for educational purposes.)'.

author: Nand Lal
title: Khargosh
gloss: The picture of the hare, with a short account of its form, habits, etc.
publisher: Nand Lal and Co., Co-operative Works
notes: Hare nature-study chart. '(Designed for educational purposes.)'.

author: Nand Lal
title: Muli wa Shalgham
gloss: Pictures of the radish and turnip with a brief account of their growth and use.
publisher: Lala Nand Lal and Co., Co-operative Works
notes: Radish/turnip nature-study chart. '(Designed for educational purposes.)'.

author: Nand Lal, Lala
title: Sher
gloss: The picture of a tiger, with a brief account of its form, habits, etc.
publisher: Lala Nand Lal, B.A., and Co., Co-operative Works
notes: Tiger nature-study chart, closing the Nand Lal picture-sheet series (s29-34) — a small co-operative educational-publishing venture (Nand Lal & Co. Co-operative Works, Sialkot) systematically producing school wall-charts; the low reg cluster (91-97) shows they were registered together early in the year. '(Designed for educational purposes.)'.
